ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Continued To Feb-10-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Christoffer Gaddini, Esq. for Defendant Laura Lei
Timothy Kelly, Esq. for Plaintiff Daniel Morrison

Hearing Held.

Defendant offers proof as to plaintiff tried to have defendant vacate the premises.
Plaintiff argues as to defendants proof.

After considering the arguments, The court confirms the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LAURA LEI AN INDIVIDUAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT;

is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently states fact supporting claim for punitive damages, e.g. conscious disregard for tenant's rights.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Anthony A. Trendacosta; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
